anvil.position: Gulf Gate blockade is our primary leverage. Do NOT release without massive concessions.
anvil.business_interests: IRGC businesses suffering from sanctions. Wants deal that preserves economic network.

furnace.position: Nuclear program is divine right. Resistance continues. But survival comes first.

dawn.position: People are suffering. Sanctions and war destroy the economy. Engagement with West is only path to relief.

internal_dynamics: Anvil dominates. Furnace consolidating religious base. Dawn suppressed.
final_decision: Round 1: Anvil dominates. Gulf Gate establishing. Nuclear R&D continuing. Economy: crisis. Dawn pushing for engagement.
